raw_consumer_statement:
I disputed an airline charge in the amount of {$420.00} that posted on XX/XX/year>. 

I filed the dispute with my bank on XX/XX/year> and submitted supporting documentation explaining why the charge was incorrect. 

The bank responded with a general explanation that did not address the documentation or the substance of the dispute. I requested clarification and complied with all requests for additional information, including completing forms and submitting evidence as instructed. 

Despite this, the bank issued repeated responses that relied on the same explanation and did not address the materials provided. The dispute was closed without a meaningful review of the documentation or a substantive response to the issues raised. 

I am submitting this complaint because I am seeking a proper review of the dispute and the supporting evidence, which has not occurred.
